name: Angel House Soup Kitchen
eligibility_requirements: Anyone in need; no ID required
notes: Soup kitchen ministry providing hot breakfast and lunch every day; also offers limited clothing and basic support.

name: Caritas Community Kitchen
eligibility_requirements: Anyone in need; some pantry services for enrolled clients
notes: Downtown community kitchen serving free hot lunches on weekdays; additional food support for Caritas clients.

name: Trinity Center Meals
eligibility_requirements: Adults experiencing homelessness or deep poverty
notes: Downtown day center providing weekday to-go breakfast and Sunday afternoon lunch.

name: Community of Christ Breakfast
notes: Weekly Sunday morning breakfast hosted by Community of Christ church.

name: Feed My People Breakfast at First United Methodist Church
provider: Foundation for the Homeless & First United Methodist Church
notes: Early morning hot breakfast twice weekly with additional services such as showers, AA meetings, clothing closet, and haircuts on some days.

name: Micah 6 Street Youth Drop-in Center Meal
provider: Micah 6 of Austin / University Baptist Church
notes: Youth drop-in center including a healthy meal, fellowship space, computer lab, and educational/self-care programs.

name: St. Andrew's Presbyterian Church Community Meal
notes: Weekly Thursday night dinner with shower and laundry facilities available; also operates a food pantry and diaper bank on some Saturdays.

name: University Baptist Church Gods Family Dinner
notes: Weekly 'God's Family Dinner' in the church fellowship space.

name: University United Methodist Church Open Door Meal
notes: Open Door Ministry brunch with clothing and toiletries available.

name: Central Presbyterian Church Meals
hours: Tue women lunch 12:00; Thu hot breakfast 8:30-11:30
eligibility_requirements: Anyone in need; women-focused lunch on Tuesdays
notes: Downtown church offering weekly hot breakfast and a women-only lunch program.

name: Home Cooked Fridays Meal
provider: Home Cooked Fridays / All Saints' Episcopal Church
notes: Weekly free prepared meal on Friday afternoons at All Saints' Episcopal Church.

name: All Saints' Episcopal Church Tuesday Breakfast
notes: Weekly Tuesday morning breakfast; same campus as Home Cooked Fridays program.

name: Olivet Baptist Church Helping Hands Food Giveaway
eligibility_requirements: Anyone in need; may be limited by household
notes: Helping Hands Center operates a twice-monthly food giveaway; not a sit-down meal but an important church-based food resource.

name: Mobile Loaves & Fishes Meal Trucks
hours: 7 days a week; schedule varies by route
eligibility_requirements: Anyone in need; served at truck stops around Austin
notes: Fleet of volunteer-driven trucks providing meals, clothing, and hygiene items at multiple sites citywide; check website or daily schedule for locations.

name: Food Not Bombs Community Meals
notes: Volunteer collective providing free vegan meals at rotating outdoor locations; schedule and locations vary.

name: Sunrise Homeless Navigation Center Meals
hours: Mon-Fri 9:00-13:00 with meals offered throughout the day
eligibility_requirements: People experiencing homelessness in the Austin metro area
notes: South Austin day center providing meals along with coordinated entry, showers, mail, and other services.
